findings.semantic_continuity: represented without deterministic semantic replay claim
findings.future_runtime_basis: safe for implementation planning, not execution

risks_found: Example hashes and paths must not be mistaken for live replay artifacts.
Future implementation must compute real hashes from canonical content.
Future implementation must validate referenced artifacts before envelope completion.
recommended_next_step: Create an implementation plan for a read-only envelope validator that checks references, computes envelope hashes, and verifies authority boundaries without mutating source artifacts.
